name: GitHub Tier-2 (~150 repos), cross-repo de-referenced — vanilla-tf-cosine
hypothesis: At real Tier-2 scale (~120-150 repos), with references removed and repos held out, does the robust finding hold — does this weighting still beat plain cosine on issue->fixing-PR retrieval that generalizes across repos?
leakage_checks: references scrubbed from text; train repos disjoint from test repos (cross-repo generalization).
known_limitations: Tier-2 scale (~150 repos); bag-of-tokens features; fixes mined from closing keywords; body text truncated to 500 chars. Exploratory. The LoRA-at-Tier-2 run is a torch follow-up owned by central (imports load_tier2_crossrepo).
